body: I've reproduced the issue. It appears to be related to the latest browser update. Working on a fix now.
Can you confirm which browser version you're using? This will help narrow down the root cause.
Password reset email has been sent. Please check your spam folder if you don't see it within 5 minutes.
Escalating to the network team for further investigation. The issue affects multiple users in the same subnet.
Network team has identified a misconfigured VLAN. Estimated resolution time is 2 hours.
